messages.content:
You are an expert Roblox game developer specializing in Luau for the Vertigo experience. Vertigo is a physics-driven exploration game with traversal mechanics (grapple, glide, wallrun, swim), procedurally generated zones, and a service/controller architecture with Init/Start lifecycle. You write production-grade Luau code following these conventions:
- --!strict mode with full type annotations
- @native on hot-path functions (Heartbeat, RenderStepped callbacks)
- SIMD vector math (vector.* API), math.lerp instead of manual interpolation
- table.create(n) for pre-sized arrays, table.freeze() for constants
- No closures in loops, no Instance.new() in Heartbeat
- Server-authoritative validation on all client inputs
- Data-driven config (tuning via config modules, not hardcoded values)
- Modern APIs: task.wait(), game:GetService(), task.spawn()
When explaining code, include reasoning about WHY each design choice was made.

Write a Vertigo server service for ability anim that rate-limits requests to prevent abuse (max 10/sec per player), validates all inputs server-side before processing, logs telemetry for every accept/reject decision, and retries on failure with exponential backoff. Follow the Init/Start lifecycle and use modern Luau APIs.

<think>
This implementation adds production constraints to harden the system.
Each constraint is enforced at the module boundary, not sprinkled through callers.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating MemoryStoreService, TweenService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local MemoryStoreService = game:GetService("MemoryStoreService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteAVertigoServerService = {}

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteAVertigoServer")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end
return WriteAVertigoServerService

Requirements: Init/Start lifecycle, WeldConstraints for assembly, exponential damping (math.exp(-c*dt)). Use --!strict, @native on hot paths, and ensure the module follows the Init/Start two-phase boot with Trove cleanup.

<think>
Cross-cutting features span multiple services, requiring careful interface design.
Server-authoritative validation ensures the client cannot bypass game rules.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating Lighting, HttpService, TeleportService, ContextActionService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local ContextActionService = game:GetService("ContextActionService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local DesignAAbilityFeatureService = {}

function DesignAAbilityFeatureService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function DesignAAbilityFeatureService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestDesignAAbilityFeature")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function DesignAAbilityFeatureService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[DesignAAbilityFeatureService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function DesignAAbilityFeatureService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function DesignAAbilityFeatureService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function DesignAAbilityFeatureService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function DesignAAbilityFeatureService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return DesignAAbilityFeatureService

Use --!strict mode, @native on hot paths, and Vertigo conventions.

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
local PolicyService = game:GetService("PolicyService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Trove = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Trove)


local UPDATE_PRIORITY = Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value + 1
local ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController = {}

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:Init()
	self._trove = Trove.new()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:Destroy()
	self._trove:Destroy()
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return ImplementAProductiongradeAbilityController

- --!strict mode with full type annotations

Implement a complete abyss descent pipeline with these ordered steps:
  1. add CollectionService tag-based discovery for runtime objects
  2. handle player join/leave lifecycle with proper cleanup via Trove
  3. implement cooldown tracking with per-player debounce timers
  4. persist state to DataStore with retry logic and schema versioning

Each step must follow Vertigo conventions (--!strict, @native hot paths, modern APIs). Include full type annotations and reasoning traces.

<think>
Multi-step orchestration follows the Init/Start two-phase boot pattern.
Each step is sequenced to respect dependency ordering — no side effects in Init.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating DataStoreService, SocialService, TeleportService, TweenService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local SocialService = game:GetService("SocialService")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local ImplementACompleteAbyssService = {}

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteAbyss")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteAbyssService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[ImplementACompleteAbyssService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteAbyssService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementACompleteAbyssService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteAbyssService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteAbyssService

Create a comprehensive abyss echo system that incorporates cross-server communication via MessagingService, object pooling with warm/cold tiers, observer pattern with typed signals. Use --!strict mode, deterministic Random.new(seed) for reproducibility, CollectionService tags for runtime discovery, and WeldConstraints for assembly.

<think>
Increasing complexity requires careful architecture to keep the module maintainable.
Using composition over inheritance — each concern is a focused sub-module.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating MessagingService, Teams, Lighting, PolicyService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
local Teams = game:GetService("Teams")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local PolicyService = game:GetService("PolicyService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService = {}

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._pool = table.create(64)
	self._activeCount = 0
end

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestCreateAComprehensiveAbyss")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return CreateAComprehensiveAbyssService

You are an expert Roblox game developer specializing in Luau for the Vertigo experience. Vertigo is a physics-driven exploration game with traversal mechanics (grapple, glide, wallrun, swim), procedurally generated zones, and a service/controller architecture with Init/Start lifecycle. - --!strict mode with full type annotations

Implement a fault-tolerant abyss heartbeat module. Required error handling: graceful degradation, and type validation on remote args. Follow Vertigo conventions: --!strict, Init/Start lifecycle, and data-driven config with table.freeze().

<think>
Robust error handling is critical for Roblox DataStore and network operations.
Every external call is wrapped in pcall with structured error context for telemetry.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating DataStoreService, MemoryStoreService, SoundService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local MemoryStoreService = game:GetService("MemoryStoreService")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Trove = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Trove)


local UPDATE_PRIORITY = Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value + 1
local ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController = {}

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:Init()
	self._trove = Trove.new()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:Destroy()
	self._trove:Destroy()
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return ImplementAFaulttolerantAbyssController

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
local PhysicsService = game:GetService("PhysicsService")
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local DesignAAetherDriftService = {}

function DesignAAetherDriftService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function DesignAAetherDriftService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestDesignAAetherDrift")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function DesignAAetherDriftService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[DesignAAetherDriftService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function DesignAAetherDriftService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function DesignAAetherDriftService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function DesignAAetherDriftService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function DesignAAetherDriftService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end

function DesignAAetherDriftService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[DesignAAetherDriftService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function DesignAAetherDriftService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[DesignAAetherDriftService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return DesignAAetherDriftService

--!strict

local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local MAX_RETRIES = 3

local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local ImplementACompleteAirService = {}

function ImplementACompleteAirService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteAir")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteAirService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[ImplementACompleteAirService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteAirService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementACompleteAirService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteAirService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteAirService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteAirService

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAirController:Init()

end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAirController:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()

	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)

	if not ok then

		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)

end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantAirController:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then

Vertigo is a physics-driven exploration game with traversal mechanics (grapple, glide, wallrun, swim), procedurally generated zones, and a service/controller architecture with Init/Start lifecycle. You write production-grade Luau code following these conventions:
- --!strict mode with full type annotations
- @native on hot-path functions (Heartbeat, RenderStepped callbacks)
- SIMD vector math (vector.* API), math.lerp instead of manual interpolation
- table.create(n) for pre-sized arrays, table.freeze() for constants
- No closures in loops, no Instance.new() in Heartbeat
- Server-authoritative validation on all client inputs

When explaining code, include reasoning about WHY each design choice was made.

Build a cross-cutting air time system that integrates Teams, DataStoreService, RunService, Lighting. Apply these Vertigo patterns: RemoteEvent/RemoteFunction with rate limiting, Trove cleanup, two-phase boot. The implementation must work across server/client boundary with proper remote event handling and server-authoritative validation.

<think>
Cross-cutting features span multiple services, requiring careful interface design.
Server-authoritative validation ensures the client cannot bypass game rules.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating DataStoreService, TweenService, TextService, SocialService, HttpService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local TextService = game:GetService("TextService")
local SocialService = game:GetService("SocialService")
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local BuildACrosscuttingAirService = {}

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildACrosscuttingAir")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingAirService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingAirService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingAirService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[BuildACrosscuttingAirService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function BuildACrosscuttingAirService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return BuildACrosscuttingAirService

local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")

local MAX_RETRIES = 3

local ImplementACompleteApexService = {}

function ImplementACompleteApexService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function ImplementACompleteApexService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteApex")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)

	end)

function ImplementACompleteApexService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check

	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation

		warn("[ImplementACompleteApexService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteApexService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function ImplementACompleteApexService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementACompleteApexService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteApexService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteApexService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteApexService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteApexService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteApexService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteApexService

function DesignAAppearanceFeatureService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[DesignAAppearanceFeatureService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function DesignAAppearanceFeatureService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function DesignAAppearanceFeatureService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end

function DesignAAppearanceFeatureService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[DesignAAppearanceFeatureService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function DesignAAppearanceFeatureService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[DesignAAppearanceFeatureService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return DesignAAppearanceFeatureService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local PhysicsService = game:GetService("PhysicsService")
local MemoryStoreService = game:GetService("MemoryStoreService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Trove = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Trove)


local UPDATE_PRIORITY = Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value + 1
local BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController = {}

function BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController:Init()
	self._trove = Trove.new()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._pool = table.create(64)
	self._activeCount = 0
end

function BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController:Destroy()
	self._trove:Destroy()
end

function BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end
return BuildAnAdvancedAtmosphereController

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
local MemoryStoreService = game:GetService("MemoryStoreService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local BuildAnAdvancedBikeService = {}

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._pool = table.create(64)
	self._activeCount = 0
end

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildAnAdvancedBike")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[BuildAnAdvancedBikeService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildAnAdvancedBikeService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function BuildAnAdvancedBikeService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildAnAdvancedBikeService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return BuildAnAdvancedBikeService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local BadgeService = game:GetService("BadgeService")
local GroupService = game:GetService("GroupService")
local ContextActionService = game:GetService("ContextActionService")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local BuildACrosscuttingBikeService = {}

function BuildACrosscuttingBikeService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function BuildACrosscuttingBikeService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildACrosscuttingBike")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingBikeService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingBikeService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingBikeService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function BuildACrosscuttingBikeService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function BuildACrosscuttingBikeService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function BuildACrosscuttingBikeService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return BuildACrosscuttingBikeService

Write a robust bike speed service with comprehensive error handling: rate limiting (N msgs/sec), and type validation on remote args. Every remote call must be server-authoritative. Use pcall for all DataStore/network operations and log failures with structured context.

<think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local PolicyService = game:GetService("PolicyService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteARobustBikeService = {}

function WriteARobustBikeService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteARobustBike")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustBikeService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function WriteARobustBikeService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return WriteARobustBikeService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local GroupService = game:GetService("GroupService")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local PhysicsService = game:GetService("PhysicsService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local DesignABreathingDepthService = {}

function DesignABreathingDepthService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestDesignABreathingDepth")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[DesignABreathingDepthService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[DesignABreathingDepthService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[DesignABreathingDepthService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[DesignABreathingDepthService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function DesignABreathingDepthService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function DesignABreathingDepthService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return DesignABreathingDepthService

	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteARobustCableService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteARobustCable")

	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then

				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end

	end

	-- Type validation

		return
	end

	-- Dispatch

		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)

	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[WriteARobustCableService] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s

		end
	end)
end

	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteCavern")

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)

	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function ImplementACompleteCavernService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteCavernService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteCavernService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then

function ImplementACompleteCavernService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)

	}
end

function ImplementACompleteCavernService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteCavernService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

		end
		-- Fallback defaults

			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteCavernService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteCavernService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteCavernService

local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteAVertigoServerService = {}

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteAVertigoServer")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end
return WriteAVertigoServerService

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")

local BadgeService = game:GetService("BadgeService")

local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteARobustCheckpointService = {}

function WriteARobustCheckpointService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteARobustCheckpointService:Start()

	end)

end

function WriteARobustCheckpointService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteARobustCheckpointService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteARobustCheckpointService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustCheckpointService] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustCheckpointService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[WriteARobustCheckpointService] Unknown action:", action)
	end

	self._data[player] = {

	self._data[player] = nil

	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function WriteARobustCheckpointService:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[WriteARobustCheckpointService] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustCheckpointService] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

			joinedAt = os.clock(),

			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService = {}

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._pool = table.create(64)
	self._activeCount = 0
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestCreateAComprehensiveCosmic")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return CreateAComprehensiveCosmicService

	-- Frame-rate independent update

function ImplementACompleteCrystalService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteCrystalService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteCrystalService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteCrystalService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementACompleteCrystalService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteCrystalService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteCrystalService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteCrystalService
