--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local BadgeService = game:GetService("BadgeService")
local Teams = game:GetService("Teams")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteAVertigoServerService = {}

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteAVertigoServer")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end
return WriteAVertigoServerService

		warn("[ImplementACompleteDoubleService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteDoubleService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function ImplementACompleteDoubleService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementACompleteDoubleService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteDoubleService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteDoubleService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteDoubleService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteDoubleService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteDoubleService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteDoubleService

	self._trove = Trove.new()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }

	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }

	if self._rateLimits then

	end
	if self._cooldowns then

	end

You are an expert Roblox game developer specializing in Luau for the Vertigo experience. Vertigo is a physics-driven exploration game with traversal mechanics (grapple, glide, wallrun, swim), procedurally generated zones, and a service/controller architecture with Init/Start lifecycle. You write production-grade Luau code following these conventions:
- --!strict mode with full type annotations
- @native on hot-path functions (Heartbeat, RenderStepped callbacks)
- SIMD vector math (vector.* API), math.lerp instead of manual interpolation

Write a robust flow field with input handling and VFX management service with comprehensive error handling: input sanitization, error telemetry/logging, and retry with exponential backoff. Every remote call must be server-authoritative. Use pcall for all DataStore/network operations and log failures with structured context.

<think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteARobustFlowService = {}

function WriteARobustFlowService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteARobustFlow")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustFlowService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function WriteARobustFlowService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return WriteARobustFlowService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Teams = game:GetService("Teams")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local DesignAFogVeilService = {}

function DesignAFogVeilService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestDesignAFogVeil")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[DesignAFogVeilService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[DesignAFogVeilService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[DesignAFogVeilService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[DesignAFogVeilService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function DesignAFogVeilService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function DesignAFogVeilService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return DesignAFogVeilService

end

function BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildAnAdvancedFootfall")

		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)

function BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)

function BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),

		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return BuildAnAdvancedFootfallService

local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")

local Trove = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Trove)


local UPDATE_PRIORITY = Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value + 1
local ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController = {}

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:Init()
	self._trove = Trove.new()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:Destroy()
	self._trove:Destroy()
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

function ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()

			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload

		end)
	end)

	if not ok then

	end
end

	else

			warn("[ImplementAFaulttolerantFootstepController] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)

  1. implement frame-locked updates via RunService.Heartbeat with @native
  2. initialize the subsystem with dependency injection in :Init()
  3. add CollectionService tag-based discovery for runtime objects
  4. set network ownership correctly for physics-driven objects

Each step must follow Vertigo conventions (--!strict, @native hot paths, modern APIs). Include full type annotations and reasoning traces.

Each step is sequenced to respect dependency ordering — no side effects in Init.

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local ImplementACompleteFreefallService = {}

function ImplementACompleteFreefallService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function ImplementACompleteFreefallService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteFreefall")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function ImplementACompleteFreefallService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteFreefallService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteFreefallService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function ImplementACompleteFreefallService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementACompleteFreefallService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteFreefallService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteFreefallService

Write a robust freefall with input handling and VFX management service with comprehensive error handling: pcall/xpcall wrapping, circuit breaker pattern, timeout guards with task.delay, and retry with exponential backoff. Every remote call must be server-authoritative. Use pcall for all DataStore/network operations and log failures with structured context.

<think>

Every external call is wrapped in pcall with structured error context for telemetry.

</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteARobustFreefallService = {}

function WriteARobustFreefallService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteARobustFreefall")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustFreefallService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function WriteARobustFreefallService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return WriteARobustFreefallService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local SocialService = game:GetService("SocialService")
local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local CreateAComprehensiveGlideService = {}

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._pool = table.create(64)
	self._activeCount = 0
end

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestCreateAComprehensiveGlide")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveGlideService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveGlideService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function CreateAComprehensiveGlideService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[CreateAComprehensiveGlideService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return CreateAComprehensiveGlideService

local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService = {}

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementAProductiongradeGlide")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return ImplementAProductiongradeGlideService

	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteGrapple")

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)

	end)

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)

	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteGrappleService

	self._activeCount = 0

function BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildAnAdvancedGrappleController")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)

		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController:Destroy()
	self._trove:Destroy()
end

function BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end
return BuildAnAdvancedGrappleController

You are an expert Roblox game developer specializing in Luau for the Vertigo experience. Vertigo is a physics-driven exploration game with traversal mechanics (grapple, glide, wallrun, swim), procedurally generated zones, and a service/controller architecture with Init/Start lifecycle. You write production-grade Luau code following these conventions:

- @native on hot-path functions (Heartbeat, RenderStepped callbacks)
- SIMD vector math (vector.* API), math.lerp instead of manual interpolation

- No closures in loops, no Instance.new() in Heartbeat
- Server-authoritative validation on all client inputs

When explaining code, include reasoning about WHY each design choice was made.

Implement a complete grapple arc pipeline with these ordered steps:
  1. handle player join/leave lifecycle with proper cleanup via Trove
  2. persist state to DataStore with retry logic and schema versioning
  3. add rescue/recovery logic when the system enters an invalid state
  4. implement cooldown tracking with per-player debounce timers
  5. initialize the subsystem with dependency injection in :Init()

Each step must follow Vertigo conventions (--!strict, @native hot paths, modern APIs). Include full type annotations and reasoning traces.

<think>
Multi-step orchestration follows the Init/Start two-phase boot pattern.
Each step is sequenced to respect dependency ordering — no side effects in Init.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.

Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local GroupService = game:GetService("GroupService")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local ImplementACompleteGrappleService = {}

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteGrapple")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteGrappleService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[ImplementACompleteGrappleService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteGrappleService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[ImplementACompleteGrappleService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteGrappleService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteGrappleService

Write a robust great tree pulse with input handling and VFX management service with comprehensive error handling: rate limiting (N msgs/sec), circuit breaker pattern, and timeout guards with task.delay. Every remote call must be server-authoritative. Use pcall for all DataStore/network operations and log failures with structured context.

<think>
Robust error handling is critical for Roblox DataStore and network operations.
Every external call is wrapped in pcall with structured error context for telemetry.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating DataStoreService, TeleportService, ContextActionService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local ContextActionService = game:GetService("ContextActionService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteARobustGreatService = {}

function WriteARobustGreatService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteARobustGreat")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustGreatService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function WriteARobustGreatService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return WriteARobustGreatService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
local TeleportService = game:GetService("TeleportService")
local TextService = game:GetService("TextService")
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local ImplementACompleteGreatService = {}

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementACompleteGreat")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteGreatService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function ImplementACompleteGreatService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteGreatService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function ImplementACompleteGreatService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementACompleteGreatService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return ImplementACompleteGreatService

function ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)

	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return ImplementAProductiongradeHapticService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local SocialService = game:GetService("SocialService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local SoundService = game:GetService("SoundService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local BuildACrosscuttingHapticService = {}

function BuildACrosscuttingHapticService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function BuildACrosscuttingHapticService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildACrosscuttingHaptic")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingHapticService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingHapticService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingHapticService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function BuildACrosscuttingHapticService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function BuildACrosscuttingHapticService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

--[[@native]]
function BuildACrosscuttingHapticService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end
return BuildACrosscuttingHapticService

You are an expert Roblox game developer specializing in Luau for the Vertigo experience. Vertigo is a physics-driven exploration game with traversal mechanics (grapple, glide, wallrun, swim), procedurally generated zones, and a service/controller architecture with Init/Start lifecycle. - --!strict mode with full type annotations

- SIMD vector math (vector.* API), math.lerp instead of manual interpolation

Write a robust high altitude wind with input handling and VFX management service with comprehensive error handling: retry with exponential backoff, fallback defaults on failure, timeout guards with task.delay, and circuit breaker pattern. Every remote call must be server-authoritative. Use pcall for all DataStore/network operations and log failures with structured context.

<think>
Robust error handling is critical for Roblox DataStore and network operations.
Every external call is wrapped in pcall with structured error context for telemetry.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating MarketplaceService, DataStoreService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteARobustHighService = {}

function WriteARobustHighService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteARobustHighService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteARobustHigh")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Error processing action:", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_scheduleRetry(player: Player, action: string, payload: any, attempt: number)
	local MAX_RETRIES = 3
	if attempt > MAX_RETRIES then
		warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Max retries exceeded for:", player.Name, action)
		return
	end

	local delay = math.min(2 ^ attempt, 30) -- exponential backoff, max 30s
	task.delay(delay, function()
		if not player.Parent then return end -- player left
		local ok, err = pcall(function()
			self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
		end)
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Retry", attempt, "failed:", err)
			self:_scheduleRetry(player, action, payload, attempt + 1)
		end
	end)
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[WriteARobustHighService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function WriteARobustHighService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end
return WriteARobustHighService

You are an expert Roblox game developer specializing in Luau for the Vertigo experience. Vertigo is a physics-driven exploration game with traversal mechanics (grapple, glide, wallrun, swim), procedurally generated zones, and a service/controller architecture with Init/Start lifecycle. You write production-grade Luau code following these conventions:
- --!strict mode with full type annotations
- @native on hot-path functions (Heartbeat, RenderStepped callbacks)
- SIMD vector math (vector.* API), math.lerp instead of manual interpolation
- table.create(n) for pre-sized arrays, table.freeze() for constants
- No closures in loops, no Instance.new() in Heartbeat
- Server-authoritative validation on all client inputs
- Data-driven config (tuning via config modules, not hardcoded values)
- Modern APIs: task.wait(), game:GetService(), task.spawn()
When explaining code, include reasoning about WHY each design choice was made.

Build a cross-cutting input device with input handling and VFX management system that integrates TextService, SocialService, PhysicsService, ContextActionService, RunService. Apply these Vertigo patterns: deterministic RNG (Random.new(seed)), DataStore schema versioning. The implementation must work across server/client boundary with proper remote event handling and server-authoritative validation.

<think>
Cross-cutting features span multiple services, requiring careful interface design.
Server-authoritative validation ensures the client cannot bypass game rules.
Using --!strict for full type safety and compile-time error detection.
Integrating DataStoreService, TweenService, MessagingService, MarketplaceService, UserInputService with proper error boundaries.
Following Vertigo conventions: @native on hot paths, table.freeze() for constants,
modern APIs (task.wait, task.spawn), and no closures in per-frame loops.
</think>

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local DataStoreService = game:GetService("DataStoreService")
local TweenService = game:GetService("TweenService")
local MessagingService = game:GetService("MessagingService")
local MarketplaceService = game:GetService("MarketplaceService")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Remotes = require(Shared.Net.Remotes)


local MAX_RETRIES = 3
local RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 1
local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local BuildACrosscuttingInputService = {}

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._cooldowns = {} :: { [Player]: { [string]: number } }
	self._stateCache = {} :: { [string]: any }
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestBuildACrosscuttingInput")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)

	RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(function(dt: number)
		self:_update(dt)
	end)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local now = os.clock()
	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingInputService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	if action == "save" then
		self:_savePlayerData(player, payload)
	elseif action == "load" then
		self:_loadPlayerData(player)
	else
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingInputService] Unknown action:", action)
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_savePlayerData(player: Player, payload: any)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		store:UpdateAsync(key, function(old)
			local data = old or {}
			data.payload = payload
			data.lastSave = os.time()
			data.schemaVersion = 2
			return data
		end)
	end)

	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingInputService] Save failed for", player.Name, ":", err)
		self:_scheduleRetry(player, "save", payload, 1)
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_loadPlayerData(player: Player)
	local store = DataStoreService:GetDataStore("PlayerData_v2")
	local key = tostring(player.UserId)

	local ok, data = pcall(function()
		return store:GetAsync(key)
	end)

	if ok and data then
		-- Schema migration
		if (data.schemaVersion or 0) < 2 then
			data = self:_migrateSchema(data)
		end
		self._data[player] = data
	else
		if not ok then
			warn("[BuildACrosscuttingInputService] Load failed for", player.Name, ":", data)
		end
		-- Fallback defaults
		self._data[player] = {
			joinedAt = os.clock(),
			lastAction = nil,
			lastUpdate = 0,
			schemaVersion = 2,
		}
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_migrateSchema(data: any): any
	local version = data.schemaVersion or 0
	if version < 1 then
		-- v0 -> v1: add lastUpdate field
		data.lastUpdate = data.lastUpdate or 0
		data.schemaVersion = 1
	end
	if version < 2 then
		-- v1 -> v2: restructure payload
		data.payload = data.payload or {}
		data.schemaVersion = 2
	end
	return data
end

--[[@native]]
function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)
	for player, data in self._data do
		if data.lastUpdate and (os.clock() - data.lastUpdate) < 30 then
			-- Active player: smooth state interpolation
			if data.smoothedValue then
				data.smoothedValue = math.lerp(data.smoothedValue, data.targetValue or 0, alpha)
			end
		end
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_publishCrossServer(topic: string, payload: any)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:PublishAsync(topic, {
			serverId = game.JobId,
			timestamp = os.time(),
			data = payload,
		})
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingInputService] Cross-server publish failed:", err)
	end
end

function BuildACrosscuttingInputService:_subscribeCrossServer(topic: string)
	local ok, err = pcall(function()
		MessagingService:SubscribeAsync(topic, function(message)
			local data = message.Data
			if data.serverId == game.JobId then return end -- skip self
			task.spawn(function()
				self:_handleCrossServerMessage(data)
			end)
		end)
	end)
	if not ok then
		warn("[BuildACrosscuttingInputService] Cross-server subscribe failed:", err)
	end
end
return BuildACrosscuttingInputService

--!strict
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local BadgeService = game:GetService("BadgeService")
local TextService = game:GetService("TextService")
local Shared = ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("Shared")
local Trove = require(ReplicatedStorage.Packages.Trove)


local UPDATE_PRIORITY = Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value + 1
local ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController = {}

function ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController:Init()
	self._trove = Trove.new()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestImplementAProductiongradeLandingController")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController:Destroy()
	self._trove:Destroy()
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end
return ImplementAProductiongradeLandingController

local RATE_LIMIT_MAX = 10
local WriteAVertigoServerService = {}

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Init()
	self._data = {} :: { [Player]: any }
	self._retryQueue = {} :: { { player: Player, attempt: number, payload: any } }
	self._rateLimits = {} :: { [Player]: { count: number, windowStart: number } }
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:Start()
	local remote = Remotes.get("RequestWriteAVertigoServer")
	remote.OnServerEvent:Connect(function(player: Player, ...)
		self:_handleRequest(player, ...)
	end)

	Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerAdded(player)
	end)
	Players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(function(player: Player)
		self:_onPlayerRemoving(player)
	end)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_handleRequest(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Rate limit check
	local now = os.clock()
	local limit = self._rateLimits[player]
	if limit then
		if (now - limit.windowStart) < 1 then
			limit.count += 1
			if limit.count > 10 then
				warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Rate limited:", player.Name)
				return
			end
		else
			limit.windowStart = now
			limit.count = 1
		end
	else
		self._rateLimits[player] = { count = 1, windowStart = now }
	end

	-- Type validation
	if type(action) ~= "string" then
		warn("[WriteAVertigoServerService] Invalid action type from:", player.Name)
		return
	end

	-- Dispatch
	self:_processAction(player, action, payload)
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_processAction(player: Player, action: string, payload: any)
	-- Process the action with server-authoritative validation
	local playerData = self._data[player]
	if not playerData then return end

	-- Apply the action
	playerData.lastAction = action
	playerData.lastUpdate = os.clock()
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerAdded(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = {
		joinedAt = os.clock(),
		lastAction = nil :: string?,
		lastUpdate = 0,
	}
end

function WriteAVertigoServerService:_onPlayerRemoving(player: Player)
	self._data[player] = nil
	if self._rateLimits then
		self._rateLimits[player] = nil
	end
	if self._cooldowns then
		self._cooldowns[player] = nil
	end
end
return WriteAVertigoServerService

		self._cooldowns[player] = nil

--[[@native]]
function DesignALayerUnlockService:_update(dt: number)
	-- Frame-rate independent update
	local alpha = 1 - math.exp(-5 * dt)

- No closures in loops, no Instance.new() in Heartbeat
